title: Gauntlet Scanner Station
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Gauntlet}}
[[File:Gauntlet_Scanner_Station.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''[[Salvager Three]]'' passing through a Gauntlet Scanner Station.]]
'''Gauntlet Scanner Station''' was the name of several [[Golan III Space Defense NovaGun|Golan III defense platforms]] responsible for coordinating the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] traffic around [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] throne [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].

==History==
A field of [[Security scanner/Legends|scanner]] [[Satellite/Legends|satellites]] encircled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and would report to the stations any suspicious activity or trespassing [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] they registered. The stations could then launch an attack, either alone (as their firepower equaled some capital ships), or in conjunction with [[Allegiance-class battlecruiser|''Allegiance''-class battlecruisers]] and other warships, which were tirelessly patrolling the [[Star system/Legends|system]].

In addition to being part of the [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] defense, the Gauntlet stations also provided headquarters for [[Human/Legends|Human]] officers to supervise the daily operation of the [[Deep Core Security Zone/Legends|Byss Security Zone]]. This included control systems for allowing starships to land on or depart from the surface of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].

Each station also housed a number of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] squadrons and other defensive forces, ready to fight if any naval force were to try and attack the [[Capital/Legends|capital]].

Though they were heavily armed, these stations also constituted one of the few points of vulnerability in the Security Zone, but it would require a highly-trained force to actually capture one of the stations. An additional factor was the willingness of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to order a full strike on any compromised station, thus making any hijacking a risky endeavor.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] {{1st}}
